query:
UPDATE games SET publishedToFeed = 1 WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25', '2026-03-26');
SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM games WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND publishedToFeed = 1 GROUP BY gameDate ORDER BY gameDate LIMIT 5;
